# api/ — the engine_api.json emitter + differ (m0-api-json). Owns boot
# composition (BootRegistry), document assembly, verb-entry hashes, the
# top-level api compat hash, and hash diffing. The committed engine_api.json
# in this directory is generated by `midday api dump` and drift-gated by
# verify.sh and CI's drift lane.

add_library(midday_api STATIC
    engine_api.cpp
)
add_library(midday::api ALIAS midday_api)

target_link_libraries(midday_api
    PUBLIC midday::options midday::base midday::reflect
    PRIVATE midday::expr xxhash::xxhash)

# The document is a golden byte-compare artifact: sim-grade FP discipline.
midday_apply_deterministic_fp(midday_api)

# Tests as an OBJECT library so doctest self-registration survives linking
# into the midday binary (D-BUILD-014 pattern). The verb round-trip tests
# reference cli/ symbols, resolved at the midday executable link.
add_library(midday_api_tests OBJECT
    engine_api_test.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(midday_api_tests PRIVATE midday::api doctest::doctest)
midday_apply_deterministic_fp(midday_api_tests)
